context: Rain may affect arrival, but the meeting is still on. Ask families to bring indoor shoes and confirm attendance.
body:
Hi families — quick update for tonight’s meeting: rain may affect arrival, but we’re still planning to meet as scheduled.

Please have the girls bring indoor shoes if they have them, and let me know if your child will be attending.

Thanks!

context: Rain may affect arrival, but the meeting is still on. Ask families to bring indoor shoes and confirm attendance.
body:
Hi troop parents,

A quick update: rain may affect arrival, but our meeting is still on as planned. Please have your child bring indoor shoes in case we need to come inside right away.

Please reply to confirm attendance. Thank you!

context: Rain may affect arrival, but the meeting is still on. Ask families to bring indoor shoes and confirm attendance.
body: Hi Troop families — a quick update for tonight’s meeting. Since rain may affect arrival, we’re still on as planned, and we may move indoors if needed. Please have your Scout bring indoor shoes, and reply to confirm whether your Scout will be attending. Thanks so much!

context: Rain may affect arrival, but the meeting is still on. Ask families to bring indoor shoes and confirm attendance.
body:
Hi Troop families,

A quick update: rain may affect arrival tomorrow, but our meeting is still on as planned.

Please have your child bring indoor shoes, and if possible, confirm whether they’ll be attending.

Thanks so much!
